subject: Re: Eric's Resignation
body:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> When Jeff left, among other things, he resigned as
> the "manager" of Ranch  
> II, LLC one of the LLC's that holds one of the
> contiguous pieces of Aspen Ranch  
> property for LHW's kids (in this case, Hannah).  We
> designated Eric to  
> replace Jeff.  I have had Eric resign as manager of
> Ranch II, LLC and would  like 
> your permission to designate Harry as the new
> manager.  May I  designate Harry 
> as the manager of Ranch II, LLC to replace Eric? 
> Please  advise.
>  
> Darren
>

body_html:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

When Jeff left, among other things, he resigned as
the "manager" of Ranch
II, LLC one of the LLC's that holds one of the
contiguous pieces of Aspen Ranch
property for LHW's kids (in this case, Hannah). We
designated Eric to
replace Jeff. I have had Eric resign as manager of
Ranch II, LLC and would like
your permission to designate Harry as the new
manager. May I designate Harry
as the manager of Ranch II, LLC to replace Eric?
Please advise.

Darren
